document_summary: Official appointment certificate from the Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee and China Advertising Association of Commerce, certifying Dehuan Liu as Deputy Director of the 13th Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee. Serves as direct proof of Liu's judging/leadership role in a nationally recognized awards program.

snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Certificate is presented to Dehuan Liu by name, establishing he is the appointee.

snippets.text: This is to certify that you are appointed as the Deputy Director of the 13th Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Direct certification of Liu's appointment as Deputy Director of the 13th Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee, proving his judging/leadership role.

snippets.subject: China Advertising Association of Commerce
snippets.reasoning: Official seal from China Advertising Association of Commerce authenticates the appointment and establishes the credibility of the issuing organization.

snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee
snippets.reasoning: Official seal from the Tiger Roar Awards Organizing Committee further authenticates Liu's appointment.

snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Date of appointment establishes timeline of Liu's judging role at the 13th Tiger Roar Awards.
